lore:quest.name: The Captain's Gambit
lore:quest.description: Roderic wants the Corrupted bled BEFORE the next outbreak, not during it. Thin their muster in the hills: slay 15 Corrupted Raiders, and The Executioner is yours.
steps: Accept the quest from Captain Roderic Hale.
Slay 15 Corrupted Raiders (raids, outbreaks and ambushes all count).
The quest completes automatically on the fifteenth kill.
